items.name: Awesome-Game-Analysis
items.description: a comprehensive collection of video game tech analysis resources

items.name: Blenvy
items.description: Bevy Code & Blender addon for a simple workflow to add & edit Bevy components in Blender

items.name: gamestudio-subagents
items.description: AI-Powered Game Development Team in Your Terminal

items.name: umodel_tools
items.description: A Blender add-on featuring import of Unreal Engine games static meshes and maps. It provides basic support for many UE games, while some have dedicated improved support.

items.name: autobake_tools
items.description: An easy to use Blender Add-on that allows you to bake Bevel Shader to the Normal Map, Ambient Occlusion to the AO Map in fully automatic mode.

items.name: UnrealMotionGraphicsMCP
items.description: 🚀 UE5-UMG-MCP: A deep-focused MCP for Unreal Engine UMG layout. Designed to maximize AI efficiency within limited context windows by prioritizing precision in UI structure, animations, and blueprint integration.
